title: Proclamation No. 506, s. 1994
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila BY THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES

PROCLAMATION NO. 506

RESERVING FOR SCHOOL SITE PURPOSES OF THE DOÑA IMELDA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL, A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED AT BARANGAY DOÑA IMELDA, MUNICIPALITY OF DIFFUN, PROVINCE OF QUIRINO, ISLAND OF LUZON

Upon recommendation of the Secretary of Environment and Natural Resources and by virtue of the powers vested in me by law, I, FIDEL V. RAMOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for school site purposes of the Doña Imelda Elementary School under the administration of the Department of Education, Culture and Sports, subject to private rights, if any there be, a certain parcel of land of the public domain situated at Barangay Doña Imelda, Municipality of Diffun, Province of Quirino, Island of Luzon, which is more particularly described as follows:

Lot No. 48, Gss-2-000216 CARP

A PARCEL OF LAND Lot No. 48, Gss-2-000216 (CARP) surveyed for Doña Imelda Elementary School, situated in Barangay Doña Imelda, Municipality of Diffun, Province of Quirino, Island of Luzon. Bounded on the W., & N., along lines 1-2-3 by Road; on the E., along line 3-4 by Provincial Road; and on the S., along line 4-1 by Road. Beginning at the point marked “1” of plan being S. 50 deg. 00’W., 6097.70 m. from BLLM No. 108, Cad-211, Santiago Cadastre.

thence N. 02-08 W., 155.00 m. to point 2; thence S. 88-23 E., 150.58 m. to point 3; thence S.  02-52 E., 148.33 m. to point 4; thence S. 89-03 W., 152.20 m. to the point;

of beginning. Containing an area of TWENTY TWO THOUSAND NINE HUNDRED TWENTY SIX (22,926) SQUARE METERS. All points referred to are indicated on the plan marked on the ground. All points by P.S. Cyl. Conc. Mons. 15 x 60 cms. Bearings true. This lot was surveyed in accordance with law and was executed by Geodetic Engineer Eulogio Alialy and was approved on December 6, 1990.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 23 rd day of November, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and ninety four.

(Sgd.) FIDEL V. RAMOS

By the President: (Sgd.) TEOFISTO T. GUINGONA, JR. Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
